name: German European School Singapore (GESS)
tagline: Bilingual German and IB education in a purpose-built campus
description: German European School Singapore (GESS) is a unique international school offering both a German curriculum stream (leading to the German International Abitur) and an English-speaking IB stream. Founded in 1971, GESS moved to its award-winning, purpose-built campus in Dairy Farm Lane in 2018. The campus features a 'green heart' design with eco-friendly learning spaces. GESS serves students from 18 months to 18 years and emphasizes bilingualism, European educational values, and a vibrant multicultural community of over 65 nationalities.

admission.process: GESS has two admissions tracks: one for the German section (for German-speaking families) and one for the IB English section. Applications are submitted online with supporting documents.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Main intake in August; mid-year entry possible where spaces exist.
admission.assessmentInfo: Placement assessments for primary and secondary students. German language proficiency required for German section.

faqs.question: What makes GESS different from other international schools?
faqs.answer: GESS uniquely offers both a German curriculum stream (leading to the German Abitur) and an English IB stream on the same campus. Its award-winning eco-friendly campus and European heritage create a distinctive educational environment.

faqs.question: Do I need to be German to attend GESS?
faqs.answer: No. The English-speaking IB section is open to students of all nationalities. The German section serves German-speaking families but is not exclusively for German citizens.

seo.title: GESS — International School Singapore | Fees & Curriculum | EduAtlas
seo.description: German European School Singapore (GESS): Dual curriculum school (German Abitur & IB) for ages 18 months-18 years. View 2025/2026 fees, admission and eco-friendly campus.
